# AI Search and Generative Engine Visibility

Buyers increasingly ask AI systems to compare tools, summarize options, and explain categories.

## Assets to create

- clear product overview page,
- pricing page,
- integration pages,
- comparison pages,
- docs pages,
- FAQ pages,
- use-case guides,
- changelog,
- security page,
- public examples,
- glossary pages.

## Answer-engine-friendly pattern

```text
Question heading
Direct answer
Specific product facts
Examples
Limitations
Comparison details
Sourceable proof
```
